questions.question: How much of the year does the prohibition of gas leaf blowers last? What date in the year does it start, and what date does it end?
questions.answer: The prohibition on gasoline-powered blowers lasts from January 1 through September 30 each year. Therefore, they are allowed only from October 1 through December 31.

questions.question: What are the permitted hours for gas leaf blower operation?
questions.answer: Gasoline-powered blowers can be operated from October 1 through December 31. During this period, they are permitted to be used from 8:00 a.m. to 6:00 p.m., from Tuesday through Friday.

questions.question: What are the penalties for violating gas leaf blower regulations?
questions.answer: The penalties for violating the noise regulations, including those for gasoline-powered blowers, start with a fine of no less than $250 for the first violation. A second offense within one year of the first incurs a fine of no less than $500. A third or additional offenses within one year of the first result in a fine of no less than $1,000. Each day a violation continues can be considered a separate offense.

questions.question: Are there any exceptions for school/government/commercial properties?
questions.answer: Yes, specific exceptions apply to school, government, and commercial properties. Golf courses conducting normal groundskeeping operations, utility companies performing emergency repairs, and municipal or school operations are not subject to the restrictions on gasoline-powered blowers. Additionally, sounds generated by municipal-sponsored projects, work, or repairs ordered by the Village Manager or designee are exempt.

questions.question: How are violations reported and enforced?
questions.answer: Violations of the noise regulations are enforced by the Code Enforcement Officer, the Building Inspector, and/or the Village Police Department of Scarsdale. They are empowered to carry out the purposes and provisions of the noise ordinance.

questions.question: Does the ordinance mention the benefits of leaving leaf debris and/or leaf mulching?
